header: Tabs Feature Section that feels ready to ship
subheadline: Frames product value with strong hierarchy, modern media support, and scannable details for every viewport.

items.title: Value spotlight
items.description: Built to show the tabs feature section with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

items.title: Workflow advantage
items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this tabs feature section easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

items.title: Capability layer
items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.
